title: Six Reasons why the Mystery of Godliness is Great
summary: “And without controversy great is the mystery of godliness: God was manifest in the flesh, justified in the Spirit, seen of angels, preached unto the Gentiles, believed on in the world, received up into glory.”(1Timothy 3:16). The first reason is because God was manifest in flesh. This is astonishing because God did not take on the form of any other creature except ours. “For verily he took not on him the nature of angels; but he took on him the seed of Abraham” (Hebrews 2:16). This is why humans must behold the God who was manifest in flesh. Shepherds in Bethlehem, wise men from the East, religious scribes, and even an evil King, such as Herod, all had one common interest in the greatest news flash in the history of the world: God was manifest in the flesh. Go and see him! John the Baptist shouted “Behold the Lamb of God!” We must all see him spiritually speaking and acknowledge that he is God manifest in the flesh. Why? Because he came in our form – the Almighty God who fills the universe, whom heaven and earth cannot contain, put on flesh and blood for our sakes. He conferred this honor upon us, hence we must behold him. In other words, because God was manifest in flesh, everyone who is in the form of flesh, must leave everything – as the shepherds and wise men were commanded – and run to Bethlehem to behold him and give him gifts to thank him and bless him because he came to save us.
